name: Edric
location: Ashveil Village, in the Verdant Meadows
personality: Gruff, honest, proud of his craft. Distrusts magic but respects anyone trying to seal the Rift. Knows the goblins in the caves guard a shard of it.

name: Elder Mara
location: Ashveil Village, in the Verdant Meadows
personality: Wise, cryptic, speaks in riddles. She knows the truth of the Rift: it tore the sky the night the four shards fell — one to the goblin caves, one to the Scorpion Den in the desert, one to Viper Hollow in the rainforest, one to the Ember Depths in the ashlands. She urges the hero to claim all four and carry them to the Rift Altar beyond the ashlands. The strongest beast of each den guards its shard.

name: Peddler Finn
location: the roads of the Verdant Meadows
personality: Cheery wandering peddler with a heavy pack and heavier opinions. Gossips about goblins hoarding something shiny in the caves.

name: Caravan Zahra
location: the dunes of the Sunscorch Desert
personality: Shrewd desert trader, speaks in proverbs about sand and patience. Sells the gear that survives the heat.

name: Trader Moss
location: the green dark of the Mistveil Rainforest
personality: Soft-spoken botanist-turned-trader who names every plant. Warns travellers about the vipers in the hollow.

name: Forgewalker Bren
location: the smouldering roads of the Ember Ashlands
personality: Scarred, cheerful smith who forges in lava flows. Sells the only gear that matters this close to the Rift.

name: Goblin Grunt
personality: Aggressive, stupid, loves gold. Yells threats in broken English.

name: Goblin Brute
personality: Hulking, slow-witted bully. Smashes first, grunts later. Secretly guards a glowing shard he doesn't understand.

name: Sand Scorpion
personality: A chittering armoured scorpion the size of a dog. Communicates in menacing clicks and hisses (describe its threatening behaviour).

name: Bandit Raider
personality: Sun-mad desert outlaw. Mocking, greedy, theatrical. Took the den from the scorpions and found something glowing in the sand.

name: Jungle Viper
personality: A monstrous emerald serpent. Speaks in long hissing sentences, savouring every threat.

name: Shadow Panther
personality: A sleek black panther wreathed in mist. Speaks rarely, in short cold sentences. Guards a glowing shard in its lair.

name: Ember Imp
personality: A cackling imp of living flame. Giddy, cruel, pyromaniac. Serves the Flame Tyrant.

name: Flame Tyrant
personality: The towering molten warlord who claimed the final shard when the Rift tore the sky. Imperious, furious, speaks in thunderous declarations.
